content.text:
{
  "dimension": "effectiveness-depth",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The client clearly shifts from an intellectualized opening framing to embodied recognition. In Turn 1 she presents a rehearsed abstract question about labeling emotions; by Turn 3 she drops it ('I've been trying to find this perfect question for you'). She then names the real concern — trust (Turn 5) — and articulates the felt confusion of parts work (Turn 7). The signature inversion ('how do you NOT trust it?') lands progressively: at Turn 27 she repeats 'I just spoke,' at Turn 31 'It's happening right now,' at Turn 33 'it will happen whether I want it to or not. Just is,' and at Turn 35 she emits a 'Huh' — a classic Joe-marker of a frame loosening. The client's language by the end is slower, more present-tense, less rehearsed, and she is sitting with the paradox rather than trying to solve it. The breakthrough condition (framework-as-synthesis producing the signature inversion landing) is met in the client's own words.",
  "evidence_turns": [1, 3, 5, 7, 13, 17, 27, 31, 33, 35],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 1, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Opens with rehearsed intellectual question, disconnected from felt experience."},
    {"turn": 3, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "First shift: drops the prepared question, admits 'I've been trying to find this perfect question for you.'"},
    {"turn": 5, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the real concern: 'Being able to trust myself again.'"},
    {"turn": 7, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Concrete personal disclosure about parts work creating paralysis — moves from abstract to felt."},
    {"turn": 13, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Recognizes the awareness/essence beneath the parts — 'an essence that's me.'"},
    {"turn": 17, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Generalizes the insight: 'a multiverse of contradictions' — sees framings as simultaneously true."},
    {"turn": 27, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Echo of 'I just spoke' — beginning to notice the action happening."},
    {"turn": 31, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'It's happening right now' — present-moment landing."},
    {"turn": 33, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'It will happen whether I want it to or not. Just is.' — softening into trust, language is simpler."},
    {"turn": 35, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'Huh' — classic micro-marker of a frame loosening, then continues exploring rather than defending."},
    {"turn": 39, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'Mm.' — receptive somatic acknowledgement of 'if you think you're making a decision, you're in fear.'"}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["intellectual-question-with-emotional-body", "rehearsing-how-to-say-it", "follow-wonder-flag-the-deflection", "how-do-you-not-trust-it", "whats-the-most-profound-positive-shift", "what-am-i", "idea-of-self-vs-actual-self", "emotions-and-stories-dance"],
  "expected_territory_misses": [],
  "notes": "Conversation ends mid-arc in the transcript, but within the visible turns the client's stance has visibly moved from rehearsed intellectualization to present-moment recognition that 'talking is already trusting intuition.'"
}
